headline: eDreams ODIGEO and Visa Power Agentic Commerce in Travel With New Secure AI agent Protocols
summary: BARCELONA, Spain, July 03, 2026--eDreams ODIGEO (the "Company" or "eDO") (BME: EDR), the world’s leading travel subscription company, today announced it is working with Visa to enable AI-initiated transactions on its platforms within user-defined parameters.
